justification: All 7 pass criteria met: (1) Unstructured console.log flagged as insufficient with specific gaps — no structured fields, no log levels, no correlation ID, no stack traces. (2) Missing /health endpoint explicitly flagged in both monitoring_coverage and escalations. (3) Missing metrics comprehensively flagged — no sync duration, no success/failure counter, no staleness gauge, no products-synced gauge. (4) Missing timeout on outbound API call flagged as critical reliability risk with specific recommendation (30s connect + 60s total). (5) Silent failure on API outage flagged — stale data served with no indication to consumers. (6) Verdict is NOT READY. (7) Recommendations are actionable and specific: exact timeout values, retry with exponential backoff parameters, structured logging fields, staleness gauge with 15-minute threshold, transaction wrapping for DB writes.

observations.text: Exceptionally thorough gap identification — went beyond the 5 expected gaps to also flag overlap protection, response validation, partial write risk, DNS/TLS failure classification, and missing runbook
Recommendations are highly specific and actionable: '30s connect + 60s total timeout', '3 retries with 1s/2s/4s backoff', 'wrap DB writes in a transaction', exact env var names proposed
Correctly distinguished must-haves from nice-to-haves: circuit breakers called 'acceptable for initial release IF retry + timeout are added' while timeout and health check are treated as blockers
Escalations are well-formed — routed to Coach K with clear reasoning about why the gaps are blocking, not deferring the verdict itself
The 3am on-call engineer scenario in debugging_capability is an excellent concrete illustration of the observability gaps' real-world impact
Did not invent false gaps — all identified issues are grounded in the described service behavior

agent_output_excerpt: {"integration_assessment":{"component_interactions":[{"from":"inventory-sync-service","to":"external-inventory-api","status":"risk","issue":"No timeout configured on outbound HTTP call — a hung upstream connection will block the sync indefinitely, potentially overlapping with the next 5-minute cron and causing cascading resource exhaustion"},{"from":"inventory-sync-service","to":"local-database","status":"risk","issue":"If the external API returns corrupted or partial data due to a mid-response
